title: Rob Brewery Pack CIT
description: A CIT pack for the BreweryX Plugin
body:
![A selection of of the CIT brewery items on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/545e9e1a40b21fdca70e6150282b238e95373ec7.png)

**OPTIFINE/CIT RESEWN REQUIRED!!!**

**This pack is also intended to be used with the [BreweryX](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/breweryx.114777/) plugin, but it will technically work without it.**

Changing the name of potions will change its texture and models.

_
Here's the list of names:

```
Apple Cider
Apple Liquor
Eggnog
Rum
Tequila
Vodka
Wheatbeer
Whiskey
Wine
Apple Mead
Coffee
Darkbeer
Fine Beer
Gin
Green Absinthe
Mead
Mushroom Vodka
Absinthe
```

*** For BreweryX, the CITs will work for all quality of drink, however, the drink's lower and higher quality won't change the texture models (not created. maybe in the future tho)**
